title: CarMax® English Premium Grade Natural Chamois Leather - Large - Perfect for drying off the whole car, glass, mirrors, inside and out, super soft and highly absorbent, Made in the UK
features: Super soft and highly absorbent, for a fast streak-free finish, no man-made product can get close to cleaning and drying. Our genuine chamois leathers are also kind to the planet.
These genuine CarMax chamois leathers, also known as a shammy or car leather are made using a traditional tanning process that will provide long-lasting drying and polishing service.
The softness of the CarMax leather cloth eliminates abrasion which means no swirl marks or fine scratching on your paintwork and the naturally occurring oils in the leather create a showroom finish
The CarMax shammy leathers are made from sheepskin and are an environmentally safe option. They are supplied in their naturally occurring shape to avoid wastage and to provide you the best chamois.
If you have not owned a shammy leather before, please read the care instructions carefully to understand how the chamois should used and how to care for and store it after use.
description: Product Description The Home of Genuine English Chamois Leather Not all chamois leathers are made equal. Ours are made here in the UK from 100% genuine sheepskin using a process that has been developed and refined for over 100 years. Clean like a pro with an authentic chamois leather from CarMax Real quality shines through Using processes developed over hundreds of years we use Chamois Leather to dry and shine polished surfaces, glass, mirrors, chrome and car bodywork. Genuine Chamois have unique properties that dry and shine surfaces courtesy of the traditional oil tannage process which forms soaps within the sheepskin. The sheepskin itself is unique, with a naturally open fibre structure that is not found in any other skins. Imitators often use deer or goat skin, these cloths look similar, but fail to replicate the unique properties of a genuine sheepskin chamois leather. Finally, the unique tanning process uses Cod fish oil which is fixed into the sheepskin making it soft and durable. A genuine sheepskin Chamois Leather will Have a soft and open grain structure to the surface, improving absorbency and polishing power Fade in sunlight. An unusual point, but genuine Chamois Leather will fade if exposed to sunlight Dry and polish like nothing else Smell of fish oil used in the tanning process. This smell will disappear after the initial rinse Genuine Chamois Leather Hand finished in the traditional way Quality checked Every chamois is inspected to ensure quality Large Small Cars, Windows, Mirrors, household, domestic Extra Large Large Cars, Windows, detailing Professional Large Cars, SUVs, Windows & Professional use UK Manufacturing is at the heart of our product range Quality and environmental impact are key considerations when it comes to manufacturing and transportation. We aim to source our products within the markets we serve, minimising transport costs and our carbon footprint, whilst maintaining the very best quality This means for our UK and European customers we source the vast majority of the products we sell from within Europe, only going further afield when there is no local option.
